name: bug-diagnose-and-root-cause-and-fix
description: 【Bug 诊断专用】当遇到程序错误、异常行为、性能问题、功能故障时必须使用本技能。触发关键词：报错、Bug、问题、异常、故障、不工作、诊断、排查、修复。本技能提供系统性根因分析，输出详细诊断报告和可执行修复方案，包含代码位置引用、步骤指导、注意事项。仅提供分析和方案，不直接修改代码。
capabilities: Analyze error messages and stack traces to identify problem sources
Review code using Read, Grep, and Glob tools to locate buggy sections
Run diagnostic commands like git log and npm list to investigate issues
Provide detailed fix solutions with exact file paths and line numbers
Document root causes with technical explanations and code references
Offer multiple solution options with pros and cons analysis
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill with no executable code. All static findings are false positives: Chinese text misidentified as cryptographic algorithms, markdown formatting misidentified as shell execution, and normal JSON strings misidentified as obfuscation. The skill only provides guidance through read-only analysis of error messages and code review.
valueStatement: Software bugs waste hours of developer time. This skill provides systematic root cause analysis, identifying exactly where and why errors occur. It delivers detailed diagnostic reports with specific code locations, step-by-step fix instructions, and multiple solution options.
userTitle: Diagnose bugs and find root causes
limitations: Does not directly modify code - only provides guidance
Cannot access external systems or APIs for debugging
Relies on user-provided error context and reproduction steps

useCases.title: Fix runtime errors
useCases.description: Diagnose application crashes and runtime exceptions with precise code location identification

useCases.title: Investigate test failures
useCases.description: Analyze test failures to determine if they are code bugs or environmental issues

useCases.title: Debug deployment issues
useCases.description: Identify root causes of build failures and deployment problems in CI/CD pipelines

promptTemplates.title: Quick error check
promptTemplates.prompt: I got this error: [paste error message]. Help me understand what caused it and how to fix it.

promptTemplates.title: Debug failing test
promptTemplates.prompt: My test [test name] is failing with: [error details]. The test file is at [path]. Review the test and source code to find the root cause.

promptTemplates.title: Analyze production bug
promptTemplates.prompt: Production is showing [symptom]. Error logs indicate: [logs]. The relevant code is in [files]. Find the root cause and suggest a fix.

promptTemplates.title: Complex debugging
promptTemplates.prompt: I have a bug where [description]. It happens when [reproduction steps]. I checked [already-tried fixes]. Use git blame to check recent changes and help identify what caused this regression.

bestPractices: Provide complete error messages including stack traces for faster diagnosis
Include the exact steps to reproduce the bug
Share relevant file paths and recent code changes
antiPatterns: Asking for fixes without sharing error details
Expecting the skill to modify code directly
Skipping the diagnosis phase and asking only for solutions

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Use it when you see error messages, crashes, or unexpected behavior.

faq.question: What information should I provide for best results?
faq.answer: Share the full error message, stack trace, reproduction steps, and relevant code snippets. More context leads to faster diagnosis.

faq.question: Does this skill modify my code?
faq.answer: No. The skill provides detailed guidance and solution steps. You apply the fixes yourself to maintain control over your codebase.

faq.question: Is my code data sent anywhere?
faq.answer: No. All analysis happens within your AI tool session. Code is processed locally and never sent to external servers.

faq.question: Can this handle performance issues?
faq.answer: Yes. Include performance metrics, slow function names, and profiling data. The skill can identify bottlenecks and optimization opportunities.

faq.question: How is this different from general debugging?
faq.answer: This skill follows a systematic four-step process: information gathering, code review, root cause analysis, and solution planning. It provides detailed reports you can directly act on.
